documents.text: I just accepted the senior product designer role at Lumen Labs! I'm relocating from Seattle to Austin next month to start. A bit nervous but mostly thrilled.
Settled into Austin finally. I adopted a rescue greyhound and named him Pixel. My favorite thing now is taking him to Zilker Park on Saturday mornings. I also signed up for a beginner pottery class.

We shipped the onboarding redesign I led at Lumen — early metrics look great. To celebrate I booked a solo trip to Lisbon in September. Also: I switched to oat milk, since dairy's been upsetting my stomach.

baselineMission: Extract professional facts about individuals, specifically their name, job title, and employer. Do not record any personal details such as pets, hobbies, preferences, travel, residence, or personal plans.
refinedMission: Extract professional facts about individuals, specifically their name, job title, and employer. Additionally, capture personal details such as where the person lives, their pets, preferences and favorites, plans and intentions, and the reasons behind their decisions.
feedback: also capture where she lives, her pets, preferences, plans, and the reason behind decisions
